word: H8162 - שַׁעַטְנֵז - shaʻaṭnêz - shah-at-naze' - Garment of divers sorts

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁעטנז

Transliteration: sha‛aṭnêz

Phonetic: shah-at-naze'

BDB Definition:

  1. mixed stuff, fabric of mixed weave, linsey-woolsey
    1. a kind of cloth forbidden for garments
    2. cloth made by weaving linen and wool together

Origin: probably of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: 2431

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
